name: remotemanager
description: Create and manage RemoteManager Dataset campaigns on local and HPC computers, including TGCC Irene configurations.

interface.shortDescription: Run RemoteManager Dataset campaigns from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Create, inspect, run, and retrieve RemoteManager Dataset campaigns on local or HPC targets through the external remotemanager-MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Create a RemoteManager campaign on Irene.
